requirements.summary: Diagnose and fix build/deployment errors in frontend TypeScript/React files
acceptanceCriteria: All existing features continue to work as before

file_operations.description: Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React-related issues in the root App component that manages view state transitions
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React hook usage issues in the HubView component that displays filterable task listings
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React hook usage issues in the ProfileView component that manages the multi-step profile flow
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React-related issues in the LandingView component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React Query hook implementation issues in the actor hook that manages backend authentication
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React context/hook implementation issues in the Internet Identity authentication hook
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or external SDK integration issues in the Google authentication hook
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React Query mutation/query implementation issues in the profile data hooks
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React Query implementation issues in the task data fetching hooks
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React Query mutation implementation issues in the task action hooks
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or React Query implementation issues in the leaderboard data hook
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the HubTopBar navigation component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the TaskCard display component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the TaskDetailsSheet slide-in component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or form handling issues in the PostTaskModal component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or form handling issues in the CompleteTaskModal component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the AuthPromptDialog modal component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the CreateProfilePromptDialog component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or data display issues in the DashboardStatsPanel component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or data display issues in the LeaderboardPanel component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the CategorySelector filter component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the FilterBar toggle component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, external library integration issues, or rendering issues in the QRCodeDisplay component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React component issues in the StarRating display component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, animation implementation issues, or React component issues in the WeeklyProgressReel component
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or utility function implementation issues in the deep links utility module
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or utility function implementation issues in the time conversion utility module
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, or utility function implementation issues in the URL parameters utility module
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or React app mounting issues in the application entry point
Review and fix any TypeScript compilation errors or type export issues in the constants configuration module
